untranslatable_reason: Signal requires double-channel normalization of a divergence indicator (CN{CN(Series_1, n=20) - CN(S&P_500, n=20), n=200}) which cannot be constructed from allowed indicators. The signal involves cross-series normalization relative to S&P 500 benchmark with custom composite calculations not available in the indicator set. While bb_pct_b approximates normalized oscillation between ±1.0 std devs, it cannot replicate the specific dual-series divergence normalization logic required.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using Bollinger Band %B as a normalized oscillator proxy (ranges -1.0 to +1.0 standard deviations), but this loses the critical cross-series co-movement neutralization and divergence calculation at the core of this signal. The original signal requires benchmark-relative volatility adjustment not achievable with available indicators.
